mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_brands) AS brandCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_items) AS menuCount, ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT choice_group_id) FROM choices WHERE is_selected = 1 AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ) AS todayChoiceCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM grams WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() ) AS todayGramCount

WITH group_products AS ( SELECT choice_group_id, GROUP_CONCAT(product_id ORDER BY product_id SEPARATOR ',') AS combo_key, MAX(created_at) AS latest_created FROM choices WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() GROUP BY choice_group_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ), popular_groups AS ( SELECT combo_key, COUNT(*) AS compare_count, MAX(latest_created) AS latest_created, SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(choice_group_id ORDER BY latest_created DESC SEPARATOR ','), ',', 1 ) AS sample_group_id FROM group_products GROUP BY combo_key ORDER BY compare_count DESC, latest_created DESC LIMIT 3 ) SELECT pg.combo_key AS comboKey, pg.compare_count AS compareCount, c.display_order AS displayOrder, pi.product_id AS productId, pb.brand_name AS brandName, pi.name AS productName, pi.description AS description, pi.image_url AS imageUrl, pi.price AS price, pi.kcal AS kcal, pi.protein AS protein, pi.sodium AS sodium, pi.sugar AS sugar, pi.saturated_fat AS saturatedFat FROM popular_groups pg JOIN choices c ON c.choice_group_id = pg.sample_group_id JOIN product_items pi ON pi.product_id = c.product_id JOIN product_brands pb ON pb.brand_id = pi.brand_id ORDER BY pg.compare_count DESC, pg.latest_created DESC, c.display_order ASC
